prayers.name: Blessing of Mercy
prayers.description: The target recovers 1 wound + your Willpower Bonus.

prayers.name: Staunch
prayers.description: Removes 1 Bleeding stack from the target.

prayers.name: Cure
prayers.description: Cures one disease. The target makes a Toughness test to throw off the worst of it.

prayers.name: Voice of Peace
prayers.description: Hostile creatures must pass a Cool test to attack anyone in range.

prayers.name: Bless
prayers.description: +10 to the next test of one type the target must make.

prayers.name: Fortify
prayers.description: +1 AP to all locations on the target.

deities.name: Sigmar
deities.dogma: Dogma: lead, defend, and sacrifice for the Empire. Hunt Chaos and the greenskins.

deities.name: Shallya
deities.dogma: Dogma: tend the dying, forgive the repentant, never deal a killing blow except against Chaos.

rows.effect: The deity is displeased; you gain 1 Sin point.
A divine reprimand. Stunned 1, and prayers cost +1 SL today.
You are struck mute. Cannot speak until end of scene.
Faith shaken: you lose access to prayers until you atone.
